name: 燭光求婚場景
description: Tristan帶Ashley回到充滿回憶的地方，閉眼牽手走台階（呼應她曾做他的眼睛），最終睜眼求婚。浪漫場景設計與前後呼應製造極強的情感衝擊。
tags: 角色互換的儀式感——曾經她引導他，現在他引導她

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Close your eyes and follow me. What for? Trust me. / Today, I'd like to formally propose to you, Miss Ashley Green. Will you marry me again? The real me says yes.
examples.context: 角色互換的儀式感——曾經她引導他，現在他引導她
